children.text: >Interviewer (Stephanie Milne-Lane) and interviewee (Kellie Stolworthy) introduce themselves. The interviewer provides the structure of the interview.

>Kellie Stolworthy provides biographical and contextual information about her life. Stolworthy describes her educational and professional background. She also details her career as a licensed makeup artist.
**Firth, Idaho, Idaho Falls, Idaho, Bingham County, Idaho State University, Makeup Artist**

>Kelly Stolworthy shares how she firsted learned about COVID-19 and what life was like when Governor Brad Little ordered all Idahoans to stay at home to slow the spread of COVID-19. Stolworthy describes in detail how the pandemic impacted the beauty profession and her business.

>Kellie Solworthy describes the COVID-19 precautions that were implemented in her salon. She discusses tensions at her work and in her community regarding masking and vaccinations. She details her first experience leaving her house after the stay at home order.
>Kellie Stolworthy describes the hardships she faced trying to obtain unemployment. She supplied background on the difficulty obtaining aid and the delayed timelines.
Kellie Stolworthy describes how painful it was to lose family members and clients during the beginning stages of the pandemic.

>Kellie Stolworthy provides insight into how her business has changed due to the pandemic. She describes traveling more due to the lack of robust work. she shares her experience traveling to Afton, Wyoming.
>Kellie Stolworthy describes how supply chain issues have impacted her business. She explains that if she doesn't have to use a product, we won't in order to conserve it.
>Kellie Stolworthy outlines the difficulties she faced when applying for PPP aid. She describes how it was particularly difficult due to federal tax deadlines changing.
>Kellie Stolworthy describes how family, friends, and clients assisted and helped her during the pandemic when she was unable to work.
Kellie Stolworthy shares that she has Crohn's disease and articulates her masking and COVID-19 precaution philosophy.

story.description: Kellie Stolworthy shares her experiences as a small business owner and professional makeup artist during the COVID-19 pandemic.
